cases.title: ma_htf_timeframe
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_019: ma_htf_timeframe: 60 -> 30
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: ma_htf_timeframe=30 on a 1h chart requests a lower-than-chart timeframe. Current PineTS/Python HTF contract treats unavailable lower-TF feeds as no-trade, so case_020 is parity-valid but behaviorally blocked.

cases.title: use_htf_trend_filter
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_020: use_ma_filter: TRUE -> FALSE; use_ma_mtf: TRUE -> FALSE; ma_htf_timeframe: 30 -> 60; use_htf_trend_filter: FALSE -> TRUE
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: HTF trend filter materially changed trade count and TW/Python lifecycle matched. PineTS remained blocked by missing 4h mock data.

cases.title: htf_trend_timeframe
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_021: htf_trend_timeframe: 240 -> 30
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed export uses HTF trend timeframe D. Trade count changed meaningfully and TW/Python lifecycle matched. PineTS remained blocked by missing 1d mock data.

cases.title: htf_trend_ma_type
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_022: htf_trend_timeframe: 30 -> 240; htf_trend_ma_type: EMA -> SMA
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Changing HTF trend MA type to SMA changed trade count as expected. TW/Python lifecycle matched. PineTS remained blocked by missing 4h mock data.

cases.title: htf_trend_ma_len
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_023: htf_trend_ma_type: SMA -> EMA; htf_trend_ma_len: 100 -> 50
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Shorter HTF trend MA length increased trade count materially. TW/Python lifecycle matched. PineTS remained blocked by missing 4h mock data.

cases.title: htf_trend_buffer_pct
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_024: htf_trend_ma_len: 50 -> 100; htf_trend_buffer_pct: 0.1 -> 0.2
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Larger HTF trend buffer changed trade count modestly but visibly. TW/Python lifecycle matched. PineTS remained blocked by missing 4h mock data.

cases.title: use_ma_slope_filter
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_025: use_ma_slope_filter: FALSE -> TRUE; use_htf_trend_filter: TRUE -> FALSE; htf_trend_buffer_pct: 0.2 -> 0.1
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed export lowered Min Ratio to 0.00005, which restored meaningful trading. Remaining TW parity gap is qty drift only.

cases.title: ma_slope_len
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_026: ma_slope_len: 200 -> 100
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Shorter MA slope length increased trade count as expected. Remaining TW parity gap is qty drift only.

cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed MACD cross filter leaves trade count near 129 and flips outcome positive versus baseline; parity gap remains drift-only.

cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed MACD hist POSITIVE filter behaves identically to case_051 on this dataset: same trade count 129 and same outcome profile; parity gap remains drift-only.

cases.title: macd_hist_mode
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_052: macd_hist_mode: POSITIVE -> RISING
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed MACD hist mode RISING has no practical effect here versus refreshed baseline: trade count returns to 131 and outcome matches baseline-level behavior; parity gap remains drift-only.

cases.title: use_macd_zero_dist_filter
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_053: use_macd_hist_filter: TRUE -> FALSE; macd_hist_mode: RISING -> POSITIVE; use_macd_zero_dist_filter: FALSE -> TRUE
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed export matches zero-dist tautology case: Use MACD Zero Dist=On with Zero Dist Min=0 leaves trade count and outcome identical to baseline-level behavior.

cases.title: macd_zero_dist_min
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_054: macd_zero_dist_min: 0 -> 0.1
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed export is not the planned pure zero_dist_min case: workbook also changes MACD Fast 12 -> 18 while keeping zero-dist enabled. Under this observed config trades drop 131 -> 127 and outcome worsens.

cases.title: macd_fast_len
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_055: use_macd_zero_dist_filter: TRUE -> FALSE; macd_zero_dist_min: 0.1 -> 0; macd_fast_len: 12 -> 8
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed export keeps zero-dist enabled at 5.0 and changes MACD Fast 18 -> 8 versus case_055. Trade count rebounds 127 -> 131 and outcome returns to baseline-level behavior.

cases.title: macd_slow_len
cases.prev_case_diff: vs case_056: macd_fast_len: 8 -> 12; macd_slow_len: 26 -> 21
cases.setting_effect_note_hint: Observed export keeps zero-dist enabled at 5.0 and changes MACD Slow 26 -> 21. Trade count moves 131 -> 127 and outcome worsens materially.

cases.title: macd_sig_len
